title: Laptop screen flickering intermittently on Dell Latitude 5540
description: My Dell Latitude 5540 screen has been flickering on and off for the past three days. It happens more frequently when I adjust the screen angle or connect to the docking station at my desk. I have updated the Intel HD graphics driver to version 31.0.101.5122 but the issue persists. The laptop is still under warranty (service tag: ABCD123E). I need this resolved urgently as I have client presentations next week and cannot work with an unreliable display. External monitor via HDMI works fine, which suggests it might be the LVDS cable or the panel itself.

title: Blue screen of death (BSOD) error CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED on workstation WS-0142
description: Getting repeated BSOD with stop code CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED approximately every 2-3 hours on workstation WS-0142. Windows Event Viewer shows the crashes correlate with the RpcEptMapper service failing. I ran sfc /scannow which found corrupt system files but was unable to repair them. The workstation runs Windows 11 Pro 23H2 with 32GB RAM and an NVIDIA RTX 4070. This started after the latest Windows Update KB5035853 was installed on Tuesday. I have already rolled back that update but the crashes continue. This is severely impacting my ability to compile and test software.

title: Printer on 3rd floor (HP LaserJet M609) jamming every 10-15 pages
description: The HP LaserJet Enterprise M609 on the 3rd floor near reception (asset tag HP-3F-007) has been jamming constantly since yesterday afternoon. It pulls paper from tray 2 but stops midway through the fuser. I have cleaned the rollers and checked for torn paper fragments inside, but found nothing unusual. Error code on the display reads 13.01.00. The printer has about 185,000 pages on it and was last serviced in October. About 15 people on this floor depend on it daily. Could someone please send a technician or arrange a replacement printer? This is really frustrating given we went through this same issue last year.

title: New ergonomic keyboard and mouse requested for workstation
description: I would like to request an ergonomic keyboard and mouse setup. I have been experiencing wrist discomfort for the past few weeks and my doctor recommended switching to ergonomic peripherals. I am looking at the Logitech ERGO K860 keyboard and MX Master 3S mouse. My employee ID is EMP-4821 and my cost center is CC-MKT-300. I checked the procurement catalog and both items are approved standard peripherals. Could you please process this request? Thank you!

title: Server rack cooling fan failure in data center Room B
description: CRITICAL ALERT from monitoring system: Cooling fan unit FAN-DC-B-04 in server rack RACK-B12 in data center Room B has failed. Current rack temperature reading is 28.3C and rising at approximately 0.5C per hour. The redundant fan FAN-DC-B-05 is still operational but running at elevated RPM. Ambient data center temperature is normal at 21C. CRAC unit DC-CRAC-03 appears to be functioning correctly. Please dispatch facilities team immediately. If temperature exceeds 35C we will need to begin graceful shutdown of affected servers: PROD-DB-01 (10.10.5.21), PROD-APP-03 (10.10.5.42), and PROD-APP-04 (10.10.5.43).

title: MacBook Pro battery not charging - only works when MagSafe is at specific angle
description: My company MacBook Pro 16-inch (2023, M2 Pro) has developed a charging issue over the past week. The MagSafe connector only charges when held at a very specific angle. I have tried three different chargers and two different power outlets so the issue is definitely with the laptop's charging port, not the adapter. Battery health in System Information shows 92% capacity with 147 charge cycles. The laptop is covered under AppleCare+. I cannot work untethered and this is causing problems when I need to take my laptop to meetings. Could we get this sent out for repair?

title: Dual monitor setup not detecting second display after Windows update
description: After installing Windows 11 update KB5035942, my second monitor (Dell U2723QE via USB-C) is no longer detected. Device Manager shows an unknown USB device with error code 43. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling the DisplayLink driver (version 11.2.2624.0), updating the Dell USB-C dock firmware to version 2.00.11.00, and resetting the display settings. The dock still works for USB peripherals and Ethernet, just not video output. My primary display connected via DisplayPort works fine. Please help - I really rely on dual monitors for my workflow and this is killing my productivity. I am running the latest BIOS version 1.18.0 on my ThinkPad T14s Gen 4.

title: Request to surplus and dispose of 12 old desktop workstations
description: We have 12 Dell OptiPlex 7070 micro desktops in storage room 204-B that are no longer needed. They were replaced during the Q3 refresh cycle. All have been wiped and have their drives removed. Asset tags are: DT-2020-1101 through DT-2020-1112. They are approximately 4 years old, Core i5-10500T with 16GB RAM. I believe they still have some residual value. Could IT arrange for proper surplus disposal per company policy? We need the storage space cleared by end of month for the new lab setup. Thank you!

title: Microsoft Outlook freezing when switching between folders
description: Outlook 365 (desktop version, Build 16.0.14326.21162) freezes for 15-30 seconds every time I switch between my Inbox and any subfolder. The status bar shows 'Processing...' during the freeze. My OST file is 4.8 GB and I have about 45,000 items in my mailbox. I have already tried running Outlook in safe mode, disabling all COM add-ins, creating a new Outlook profile, and repairing the Office installation from Control Panel. Nothing has helped. Other Office apps work fine. This started about two weeks ago and is getting progressively worse. I am on Windows 11 Enterprise 23H2.

title: SAP GUI 7.70 crashes when executing transaction SE16 on large tables
description: SAP GUI for Windows version 7.70 patch level 4 crashes consistently when I try to display the contents of large tables (e.g., VBAK with 2M+ records) using transaction SE16. The application becomes unresponsive and then closes with a Windows error dialog saying 'sapgui.exe has stopped working'. I have tested this on three different workstations with the same result. Our SAP system is S/4HANA 2023 FPS01. Smaller tables work fine. I increased the GUI memory allocation to 4096 MB via saplogon.ini but it did not help. This is blocking our year-end data reconciliation process that must be completed by Friday.

title: Adobe Creative Cloud apps failing to launch with error code 201
description: After updating Creative Cloud Desktop to version 6.1.0.587, none of the Adobe applications will launch. Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign all fail with error code 201. I have tried signing out and back into Creative Cloud, clearing the Adobe cache from %APPDATA%, and running the Creative Cloud Cleaner Tool. The Creative Cloud app itself opens but shows all apps as 'Up to date' rather than 'Open'. I am on macOS Sonoma 14.3.1 on a MacBook Pro M2. This is urgent as I have a brochure deadline this Thursday. Adobe support chat was unhelpful after a 45-minute wait. I really need this sorted out ASAP please.

title: Salesforce reports showing incorrect currency conversion rates
description: Multiple Salesforce reports in the EMEA dashboard are showing incorrect currency conversion rates. EUR to USD is displaying 1.08 when the current rate should be 1.0747, and GBP to USD shows 1.27 when it should be 1.2635. This affects our quarterly revenue reporting. The 'Manage Currencies' setup in Salesforce shows correct Dated Conversion Rates for March 2026, but the report engine seems to be using some cached values. I have tried clearing the browser cache and using an incognito window. The issue affects Chrome, Firefox, and Edge. Our Salesforce org is Enterprise Edition running Spring '26 release. Could someone from the CRM team investigate?

title: Request to install Visio Professional 2021 on my workstation
description: I need Microsoft Visio Professional 2021 installed on my workstation (EMP-3287, WS-0289) for a new project that requires detailed network diagrams and process flowcharts. I checked the Software Center and only Visio Standard is available, but I need the Professional features for database modeling and UML templates. My manager, David Kim, has approved this via email. My cost center is CC-ENG-200. Can IT please push the Visio Pro license to my machine? Thank you for your help!

title: Zoom client crashing during screen sharing on Ubuntu 22.04
description: The Zoom client (version 6.0.6, flatpak) crashes consistently when I try to share my screen on Ubuntu 22.04.3 LTS with Wayland display server. The crash happens about 10-15 seconds after I click the Share Screen button. The system logs show a segfault in libpipewire-0.3.so.0. Screen sharing works fine on X11 session, but our IT-managed Ubuntu image defaults to Wayland. Other video conferencing tools (Google Meet via browser, Microsoft Teams via flatpak) do not have this issue. Is there a known workaround? I have already tried --disable-gpu flag and enabling XWayland for Zoom, but the problem persists.

title: Microsoft Teams notifications not appearing on Android phone
description: I am not receiving push notifications for Microsoft Teams messages on my Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (Android 14, Teams version 1420/1.0.0.2024031301). The app works fine when I have it open, but I get no badge, no sound, and no notification when it is in the background. I have already verified that notifications are enabled in Android Settings > Apps > Teams, and background data usage is unrestricted. Battery optimization is set to 'Not optimized' for Teams. I have cleared the app cache and data, reinstalled the app, and toggled the notification switches off and on multiple times. Chat and channel notifications are both enabled in Teams settings. This is really annoying as I keep missing important messages from my team.

title: Jenkins build pipeline failing at integration test stage
description: Our CI/CD pipeline in Jenkins (https://jenkins.internal.company.com/job/api-platform/job/main/) has been failing at the integration-test stage since yesterday. The error is: 'com.mongodb.MongoSocketReadException: Prematurely reached end of stream' connecting to MongoDB replica set at mongodb-prod-01.internal:27017, mongodb-prod-02.internal:27017, mongodb-prod-03.internal:27017. The unit test stage passes successfully. This is blocking merges to the main branch for the entire API platform team (8 developers). We checked the MongoDB server logs and see excessive connection churn. Could the database team check if there is a connection pool issue or if one of the replica set members is unhealthy? Build number 2847 through 2853 have all failed with the same error.

title: Zoom client crashing during screen sharing on Ubuntu 22.04
description: I am experiencing a similar issue to the one reported previously. The Zoom client on my Ubuntu 22.04 workstation crashes when I try to share my screen during meetings. The screen goes black for a moment, then Zoom closes completely. I am using the .deb package version 6.0.6 rather than flatpak. My display server is Wayland. I have an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 with driver version 535.129.03. This only started happening after the latest system update last week. Could someone please look into this? I have an important client demo on Friday and really need screen sharing to work.

title: Slack desktop app consuming excessive memory - up to 3.2 GB RAM
description: The Slack desktop application (version 4.39.93, Windows x64) is consuming increasingly more memory over the course of the day. By mid-afternoon it is using 3.2 GB of RAM and causing the system to become sluggish. I am in about 15 channels and 5 direct message conversations. I have tried clearing the cache (AppData > Roaming > Slack > Cache), resetting the app data, and even uninstalling/reinstalling. The memory growth is gradual - it starts at around 400 MB on launch. This behavior has been getting worse over the past month. I have 16 GB RAM on my laptop and Slack alone is using 20% of it. Could this be a memory leak? I am on Windows 11 Enterprise.

title: VPN connection dropping every 15-20 minutes when working from home
description: My Cisco AnyConnect VPN (version 4.10.06079) disconnects approximately every 15-20 minutes when I work from home. I get the message 'Connection terminated. The secure gateway has rejected the connection attempt.' After reconnection it works for another 15-20 minutes before dropping again. I have tested this on two different home networks (Comcast and AT&T fiber) with the same result. I have a stable 500 Mbps fiber connection at home. Other colleagues in my team are not experiencing this issue. I have reinstalled AnyConnect twice and tried both the default connection profile and the backup profile. I also checked that my Cisco ISE posture assessment passes. My employee ID is EMP-6102.

title: WiFi extremely slow in Building C, 2nd floor conference rooms
description: WiFi performance in the Building C second floor conference rooms (rooms C201-C208) has been terrible for the past two weeks. Speed tests show download speeds of 2-5 Mbps when we should be getting at least 100 Mbps. There are 4 Cisco Catalyst 9120AXI access points on this floor (AP-C2-01 through AP-C2-04). The issue is worst during peak hours (10 AM - 2 PM) when there are many meetings. The main office areas on the same floor seem fine - the problem is isolated to the conference rooms. We had a reconfiguration of the wireless controllers last month (WLC-01 and WLC-02). Could someone investigate if something changed with the AP placement or channel assignments? Several VPs have complained about this during their meetings.

title: Cannot access internal wiki at wiki.internal.company.com from office network
description: Since this morning I cannot access the internal wiki at wiki.internal.company.com (10.10.1.55). The page just loads indefinitely and then times out. Other internal sites like intranet.company.com (10.10.1.10) and jira.internal.company.com (10.10.1.40) work fine. I can ping 10.10.1.55 successfully and get responses in under 1ms. DNS resolution is correct (nslookup shows 10.10.1.55). The wiki server is a Confluence instance running on CentOS 8 with Nginx reverse proxy. I have tried Chrome, Firefox, and Edge - all have the same issue. My colleagues sitting next to me can access it without any problems, which is baffling. I restarted my laptop and cleared the DNS cache with ipconfig /flushdns.

title: Firewall rule blocking FTP access to partner SFTP server at 203.0.113.50
description: We need FTP/SFTP access to a partner company's file server at 203.0.113.50 (port 22 for SFTP). Our automated batch jobs that transfer nightly data files are failing with 'Connection refused'. The partner confirmed their server is up and accessible from other clients. We suspect our Palo Alto firewall (PA-5250, serial FW-CORP-01) is blocking outbound connections to this IP. The connection originates from our integration server INT-SRV-01 at 10.10.3.100. We need port 22 (SSH/SFTP) opened outbound to 203.0.113.50/32. Our change request CR-2026-0415 has been pre-approved by the security team. This is causing our nightly ETL pipeline to fail and data is backing up.

title: Request to set up guest WiFi network for office visitors
description: We are hosting a technology conference with approximately 200 external attendees next month (May 15-17) and need a dedicated guest WiFi network set up. The network should provide internet access only, no access to internal company resources. We need it to support at least 200 simultaneous connections. Ideally, the captive portal would show a splash page with the event branding and require an email address for login. The conference will take place in Building A, floors 1-3 and the main auditorium. Please coordinate with the Events team (contact: Jennifer Walsh, ext. 4500) on the splash page branding. We also need a separate VLAN for the event registration kiosks. Thank you!

title: Intermittent network latency spikes affecting VoIP phone quality
description: We have been experiencing intermittent network latency spikes on our VoIP VLAN (VLAN 100) between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM over the past week. Users are reporting choppy audio, dropped calls, and one-way audio issues. Wireshark captures show periodic bursts of 200-500ms latency on the voice VLAN, while the data VLAN (VLAN 10) appears normal. Our phone system is Cisco Unified Communications Manager 14.0 on server CUCM-01 (10.10.2.50). The core switches are Cisco Catalyst 9500-48Y4C (CORE-SW-01 and CORE-SW-02) running in VSS mode. QoS policies for voice traffic (DSCP EF, priority queue) appear to be in place. Could the network team investigate if there is a spanning-tree event or routing loop during these hours?

title: IP address conflict detected between workstation and network printer
description: I am getting 'Windows has detected an IP address conflict' warnings on my workstation (WS-0312) at IP 10.10.8.112. The conflict appears to be with a network printer that was recently moved to the 3rd floor. When the conflict occurs, I lose network connectivity for about 30 seconds. Our DHCP scope is managed by Windows Server 2022 (DHCP-SRV-01, 10.10.1.25). The printer is supposed to have a static reservation but it seems like someone may have set it up with a static IP that overlaps with the DHCP pool. The printer in question is a Ricoh MP C3004 at location Building B, Floor 3, near cubicle cluster B3-200. Can we get this resolved before it causes bigger issues on the network?

title: Request for static IP address for new IoT sensor equipment
description: Our Facilities team has installed 15 new environmental monitoring sensors across the data center and office areas. These sensors communicate via MQTT over TCP port 1883 and need static IP addresses assigned. They are currently using DHCP but we need them to have fixed addresses for firewall rules and monitoring dashboard configuration. The sensors are manufactured by Monnit and have MAC addresses starting with 00:4B:A5. They need to be placed on VLAN 300 (IoT network, subnet 10.10.30.0/24). Please assign IPs 10.10.30.201 through 10.10.30.215 and create the corresponding DHCP reservations and DNS A records (naming convention: iot-sensor-dc-NNN.internal.company.com). I will provide the full MAC address list once the request is acknowledged.

title: Cannot access shared SharePoint folder after department transfer
description: I transferred from the Marketing department to the Finance department two weeks ago, but I still cannot access the Finance team's SharePoint Online site at https://company.sharepoint.com/teams/finance. When I try to access it, I get 'You need permission to access this site' and a button to request access. My manager, Patricia Wells, confirmed she has added me to the Finance-Members Microsoft 365 group. I can see the group in my Outlook (it appears under Groups), but SharePoint still denies access. I have tried signing out and back into Office 365, using a different browser, and clearing cookies. My old Marketing SharePoint access still works fine. IT provisioning ticket PROV-2026-0387 was supposedly completed last week.

title: MFA prompt appearing every time I open Outlook on my phone
description: For the past week, Microsoft Authenticator prompts me for MFA approval every single time I open the Outlook app on my iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 17.4). It used to remember me for 30 days but now asks every time. I have verified that the 'Remember me for 30 days' setting is enabled in my Azure AD Conditional Access policy. I have uninstalled and reinstalled both the Outlook and Authenticator apps. I also removed and re-added my corporate account (EMP-2156). The issue does not occur on my Windows laptop or when using Outlook on the web. Other colleagues in my team are not experiencing this. I am really grateful for any help on this as it is extremely disruptive to have to approve MFA 20+ times a day.

title: Need admin access to install PostgreSQL development tools
description: I need local administrator privileges on my development workstation (WS-0512) to install PostgreSQL 16 and pgAdmin 4 for a new database migration project. The standard user account prevents me from installing database services, creating Windows services, and modifying system PATH variables. My manager, Frank Chen, has approved this request via ServiceNow catalog item REQ-2026-0144. The access is needed for a maximum of 90 days while the migration project is active. After that, admin rights can be removed. I have completed the security awareness training module and signed the elevated access acknowledgment form. Please process this as soon as possible as our project kickoff is on Monday.

title: Locked out of account after too many failed password attempts
description: I have been locked out of my Windows account and cannot log in to my workstation. The error message says 'Your account has been locked. Please contact your system administrator.' I think what happened is I was using my old password after the mandatory password change last Friday, and after several failed attempts my account got locked by Active Directory. My username is j.anderson and my employee ID is EMP-1587. I am working from the San Diego office today (Building D, Floor 2, desk D2-041) so I cannot walk over to the IT helpdesk in HQ. Can someone unlock my account remotely? I have several deadlines today and cannot afford to be offline. Thank you!

title: Service account svc_sqlbackup expired password causing backup failures
description: Our automated SQL Server backup jobs have been failing since yesterday because the service account 'svc_sqlbackup' has an expired password. The account is used by SQL Agent to connect to the backup storage server at \nas-backup\sql-backups. The backup jobs run on SQL-SRV-01 (10.10.5.30) and SQL-SRV-02 (10.10.5.31). Error in SQL Agent history: 'Login failed for user 'svc_sqlbackup'. Reason: Password expired.' This account was supposed to be on the no-expiration list but apparently was not. We have 3 days of unbacked-up production databases now. The account is managed in Active Directory OU=Service Accounts,OU=Production,DC=company,DC=internal. Please reset the password, set it to never expire, and update the SQL Agent credentials. Reference change ticket CHG-2026-0287.

title: Emails sent to external recipients stuck in Outbox with error 550 5.7.1
description: Since yesterday morning, emails I send to external recipients (anyone outside our company domain) are getting stuck in my Outlook Outbox and not delivered. I eventually receive a non-delivery report (NDR) with: '550 5.7.1 Service unavailable; Client host [10.10.1.100] blocked using Spamhaus SBL. To request removal, see https://www.spamhaus.org/query/ip/10.10.1.100.' Internal emails work fine. My workstation IP is assigned via DHCP and is 10.10.1.100, which is actually the external NAT IP of our mail gateway. Our mail server is Exchange Server 2019 (MAIL-01, 10.10.2.20). This suggests our outbound mail server IP may have been blacklisted. Our entire company's external emails could be affected. This is urgent as our sales team is reporting they cannot communicate with clients.

title: Outlook autocomplete cache showing incorrect email addresses for contacts
description: When I type names in the Outlook To: field, the autocomplete suggestions include several outdated and incorrect email addresses for people who have changed their names or email addresses due to marriage or department changes. For example, typing 'Sarah' shows Sarah's old address sarah.jones@company.com instead of her current sarah.chen@company.com. I know how to delete individual entries from the autocomplete cache using the X button, but there are too many incorrect ones to do manually. Is there a way to clear the entire autocomplete cache (NK2 file) and rebuild it? I am on Outlook 365 desktop, Windows 11. Also, the Global Address List (GAL) shows the correct addresses, so the issue is only with the local cache. Thank you!

title: Mailbox size limit reached - unable to send or receive emails
description: I am getting the message 'Your mailbox is full' in Outlook and can no longer send or receive emails. My mailbox size is showing 49.8 GB out of the 50 GB limit. I have been archiving to a local PST file monthly, but my online mailbox keeps growing due to large attachments from the engineering team. I have deleted items from the Deleted Items folder and emptied the Recoverable Items folder, but only freed up about 800 MB. I understand our Exchange Online Plan 2 should allow up to 100 GB. Can someone check if I am on the right license? My employee ID is EMP-3287 and my email is maria.santos@company.com. I really appreciate quick help as I am expecting an important contract document today.

title: Email distribution list 'all-staff' is receiving duplicate messages
description: Since the Exchange Server maintenance window last Saturday, members of the 'all-staff' distribution list have been receiving duplicate copies of emails sent to the list. Each message appears twice in the Inbox. I checked the DL membership in Exchange Admin Center and there are no duplicate memberships. The issue seems to affect all 2,400 members of the list. We have tested by sending a test message to all-staff and confirmed everyone receives two copies. Other smaller distribution lists do not seem to be affected. The DL has about 20 nested groups. Our Exchange server is Exchange 2019 CU13 on MAIL-01 (10.10.2.20). Could someone from the Exchange team investigate? This is confusing people, especially for company-wide announcements.

title: Set up out-of-office auto-reply for extended medical leave
description: I will be on medical leave from April 14 through May 9, 2026 and need to set up an out-of-office auto-reply in Outlook. Could IT help me configure this? I want the message to say I am currently out of the office and will respond to emails upon my return. For urgent matters, people should contact my manager Jennifer Walsh at j.walsh@company.com or call the main department line at ext. 4200. I would also like emails to be automatically forwarded to Jennifer during my absence. My email is r.nguyen@company.com. I tried setting this up myself in Outlook Web Access but the forwarding rule option is greyed out, possibly due to our mail transport rules. Thank you so much for your assistance!

title: Suspicious login attempts from foreign IP addresses on my account
description: I received three email alerts from our IT security team about failed login attempts on my corporate account from IP addresses in Russia (91.108.4.0/24) and Brazil (177.54.150.0/24). I have not traveled to either country and do not use a VPN that would route through these locations. The attempts occurred at 2:14 AM, 2:16 AM, and 2:17 AM last night. I have changed my password immediately and verified my MFA device (Microsoft Authenticator) is still listed as my primary method. However, I noticed an unfamiliar registered device called 'Windows PC - Moscow' in my Azure AD portal that I did not add. I have removed it. Could security team investigate if there was an actual breach or if this was just a brute-force attempt? I am EMP-4821.

title: Potential phishing email reported - fake CEO wire transfer request
description: I received a very convincing phishing email that appears to be from our CEO, James Richardson (j.richardson@company.com), requesting an urgent wire transfer of $45,000 to a new vendor account. The email was sent from the address j.richardson@companny.com (note the extra 'n' in company). The email had a similar signature block and writing style. The wire transfer request referenced a 'confidential acquisition' and asked me to 'keep this between us.' I did not respond or click any links. I have attached the original email (.eml file) for analysis. Several other people in the Finance department received similar emails. This appears to be a targeted Business Email Compromise (BEC) attack. Please alert the security team to send a company-wide warning.

title: Endpoint detection alert - Troj/GenKryptik on workstation WS-0198
description: Our CrowdStrike Falcon sensor generated a high-severity detection alert on workstation WS-0198 (assigned to EMP-7203, Michael Barnes in the HR department). Detection: Troj/GenKryptik.FLCAB (malware confidence: 98.7%). The file was quarantined: C:\Users\mbarnes\AppData\Local\Temp\invoice_Q1_2026.exe (SHA256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855). The user reported opening an email attachment that appeared to be a Q1 invoice from a known vendor. CrowdStrike has blocked network connections from this endpoint. The workstation has been isolated from the corporate network via EDR network containment. Please investigate the full scope - check for lateral movement, data exfiltration indicators, and other affected endpoints.

title: Vulnerability scan found unpatched Apache Struts on production web server
description: Our quarterly vulnerability scan (Tenable Nessus, scan ID NS-2026-Q1-0042) identified a critical vulnerability (CVSS 9.8) on our customer-facing web server WEB-PROD-01 (10.10.6.10). The finding is CVE-2024-53677 - Apache Struts 2 flawed Struts plugin and forced OGNL evaluation. The server is running Apache Struts 2.5.33 but the patched version is 2.5.34 or later. This server hosts our customer self-service portal at portal.company.com and processes about 15,000 requests per hour. Patching requires a coordinated maintenance window with the application team. Our change advisory board meeting is next Tuesday. Can security provide a risk assessment and remediation timeline? PCI-DSS compliance requires critical vulnerabilities to be patched within 30 days.

title: SQL Server query performance degradation on reporting database
description: Multiple critical reports in our BusinessObjects environment are running significantly slower since last weekend. A query that normally takes 30 seconds is now taking over 12 minutes. The reports query the reporting database REP-DB-01 (SQL Server 2022, 10.10.5.50) which replicates from production using transactional replication. I checked sys.dm_exec_requests and found multiple queries with PAGEIOLATCH_SH waits and CXPACKET waits, suggesting I/O bottlenecks and parallelism issues. The database size grew from 450 GB to 580 GB last week due to a large data import. UPDATE STATISTICS was last run 6 weeks ago. REBUILD INDEX job failed on Sunday due to insufficient disk space on the D: drive (only 2 GB free). Could the DBA team look into this urgently?

title: Request to create read-only database user for external auditor
description: Our external auditors from Deloitte need read-only access to three production databases for the annual financial audit: FIN_DB_2025, FIN_DB_2024, and PAYROLL_2025. They need to query tables but should not be able to modify, drop, or export data. Please create a login 'ext_auditor_2026' with SQL Server authentication and assign it the db_datareader role on the three databases. The password should be communicated securely to the lead auditor, Ms. Catherine Hughes, and set to expire in 60 days. Access should be logged and auditable. Our IT security policy requires a reference ticket and manager approval, which has been provided by VP of Finance, Mark Davidson (approval doc attached). The auditors will connect via VPN from their own laptops.

title: MongoDB replica set primary keeps stepping down during high load
description: Our MongoDB 7.0 replica set (3 nodes: mongodb-prod-01/02/03, all running on Ubuntu 22.04 with 128GB RAM each) is experiencing frequent primary step-downs during peak business hours (10 AM to 3 PM). The primary node steps down for about 30-60 seconds before a new primary is elected, during which all write operations fail. The MongoDB logs show 'shutting down with code: 100' and 'not electing self, would vote no' messages. Server metrics during the incidents show CPU at 95%, page faults exceeding 50K/sec, and wiredTiger cache eviction pressure. The working set exceeds available RAM. We have about 2.4 TB of data across all collections. The election priority settings are default (priority 1 for all nodes). Could the DBA team help tune the MongoDB configuration or suggest a scaling approach?

title: AWS EC2 instances in us-east-1 unreachable after VPC route table change
description: After applying infrastructure changes via Terraform (commit abc1234, plan ID tf-plan-2026-0410-001) at 3:00 AM, our production EC2 instances in AWS us-east-1 (i-0abc123def456, i-0def789ghi012) are no longer reachable via SSH or HTTP. The instances are running (EC2 console shows 'Running' status with 2/2 checks passing), but we cannot connect to them. The Terraform change modified the VPC route table RTB-10.10.0.0/16-Public to remove the route to internet gateway igw-0abcd1234 and added a route to NAT gateway nat-0efgh5678. It appears the public subnets lost their route to the internet. Our application monitoring (Datadog) shows all services are down. The change was part of migrating to a hub-and-spoke VPC architecture. This is a P1 incident affecting our customer-facing applications.

title: Azure Kubernetes Service cluster nodes in CrashLoopBackOff
description: Our AKS cluster 'aks-prod-eastus-01' (Kubernetes 1.29, 5 node pool VMSS with Standard_D4s_v3) has 8 out of 20 nodes in 'NotReady' state. kubectl describe node shows Kubelet is unhealthy and pods on these nodes are in CrashLoopBackOff. The affected nodes are in node pool 'system' and 'app-pool-2'. The error message is 'PLEG is not healthy' and 'Container runtime network not ready'. This started after we applied a Calico network policy update and a cluster autoscaler configuration change. Critical workloads affected include our payment processing service (3 replicas down to 1), order management (2 replicas down to 0), and the customer notification service (all 3 replicas down). The Azure Network Watcher shows intermittent packet drops on the VNet. Please investigate urgently.

title: Request to provision new development environment in AWS
description: We need a new AWS development environment provisioned for our upcoming machine learning project. The requirements are: 1 VPC with public and private subnets in us-east-1, 1 EC2 p4d.24xlarge instance (8x A100 GPUs, 320 GB GPU memory) for model training, 1 EFS filesystem (500 GB), 1 RDS PostgreSQL db.r6g.xlarge instance, and S3 bucket for training data storage. Estimated monthly cost is around $12,000. I have uploaded the infrastructure diagram and security requirements to the SharePoint folder 'ML Project - Infrastructure'. The project lead is Dr. Amanda Foster and the budget code is BC-RD-2026-ML. We need this environment ready by April 25 for our sprint kickoff. We have an approved AWS Service Control Policy exception for GPU instances (reference: SCP-EXC-2026-012).

title: Docker container logs filling up disk space on production server
description: The Docker container logs on our production application server APP-SRV-03 (10.10.4.60, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, Docker Engine 25.0.3) are consuming excessive disk space. The /var/lib/docker/overlay2 directory has grown to 187 GB, leaving only 3 GB free on the 256 GB root partition. One particularly chatty microservice (order-processor) has accumulated 45 GB of log data in the past week alone. We have 8 containers running on this host. I need help configuring Docker log rotation (json-file driver with max-size and max-file options) and cleaning up existing log files. The standard Docker daemon.json configuration was apparently not applied when this server was provisioned. This is becoming urgent as we risk the server running out of disk space, which would bring down all 8 services.

All need AD accounts, M365 licenses (E3), VPN access, GitHub Enterprise access (Engineering org), AWS IAM access (dev environment), Slack, and access to Confluence, Jira, and the shared Engineering SharePoint site.
